data.title: Bybit partners with Tether to boost content creation in Sri Lanka with Ceylon Cash, world's 2nd largest crypto exchange.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on September 18, 2025, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, announced a new partnership with Ceylon Cash in Sri Lanka. In conjunction with Tether, a leading company in the digital asset sector, this local initiative aims to foster growth and innovation.

data.title: Reju uses AR at Climate Week NYC 2025 to showcase global textile waste issue on landmarks. Launching on 22nd.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, Reju™, a prominent textile-to-textile regeneration firm, announced its innovative use of augmented reality (AR) during Climate Week NYC 2025 in Paris. The company aims to shed light on the global waste crisis within the textile industry. The AR experience will be unveiled on September 22nd, allowing attendees and city residents to witness the scale of this issue firsthand.

data.title: Kodiak Gas Services launches $200 million senior unsecured notes offering, due 2033, to support company growth.
data.description: Kodiak Gas Services, Inc. unveiled that its subsidiary, Kodiak Gas Services, LLC, has initiated a private offering of $200 million in aggregate principal amount of 6.500% senior unsecured notes due 2033. These Additional Notes will serve as supplementary senior notes due 2033 under the Company’s September 5, 2025 indenture.

data.title: Gerald Group raises $700 million for North American trading entity in refinancing and upsizing efforts.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, in New York and London, Gerald Group announced the successful refinancing and upsizing of the senior secured Borrowing Base for GT Commodities LLC, its North American trading entity. The Facility now totals US$700 million, with a term of 2 years.

data.title: Caliber buys $6.5M in Chainlink, aligning treasury with Chainlink reserve, following infrastructure-first vision.
data.description: Caliber has made its second acquisition as part of its Digital Asset Treasury strategy, aligning itself with Chainlink's infrastructure-first approach. This move signifies the start of an expanding LINK treasury for the company.

data.title: Global Beetroot Powder Market set to reach USD 640.5 Million by 2034, a 5.1% CAGR from 2025. Demand was USD 440.5 Million in 2024, expected to hit USD 458.2 Million in 2025. Market grows due to wellness trends, food/beverage applications, and popularity in sports nutrition. Increasing focus on natural, plant-based ingredients drives growth. Efforts in organic farming and advancements in processing contribute. Market experiencing accelerated growth driven by health benefits. Manufacturers using beetroot powder in various products. This growing market reflects consumer preferences for clean-label, plant-based, and functional foods.
data.description: The global Beetroot Powder Market was valued at around USD 440.5 Million in 2024, expected to reach USD 458.2 Million in 2025, and projected to hit approximately USD 640.5 Million by 2034, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 5.1% during 2025-2034. The market growth is driven by increasing consumer interest in natural, functional, plant-based food & drink ingredients, with benefits like cardiovascular enhancement, stamina boost, and detoxification, driving the demand. Factors like wellness trends, food & beverage applications, and popularity in sports nutrition contribute to this growth. The market report covers detailed insights on market size, trends, key segments, regional scope in North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa, and South & Central America, including competitive landscape and growth factors. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: XCharge NA's GridLink battery-integrated DC fast charging solution gets Honorable Mention in 2025 Fast Company Awards.
data.description: KYLE, Texas-- XCharge North America, a subsidiary of XCHG Limited (NASDAQ: XCH) specializing in high-power EV charging and battery-integrated solutions to enhance the North American electrical grid, is excited to share that their GridLink fast charging solution received an Honorable Mention in the Fast Company Innovation by Design Awards 2025 for Best Design in North America. This recognition highlights the innovation and design excellence of GridLink in the industry.

data.title: Aveanna Healthcare successfully refinanced debt, adding $439.0M in loans, increasing revolving credit to $250M. Maturity dates extended.
data.description: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: AVAH) based in Atlanta, announced on September 18, 2025, the successful completion of the refinancing of its first lien credit facility. This new arrangement involves refinancing existing first lien term loans amounting to $886.0 million, an additional borrowing of $439.0 million in incremental first lien term loans, and increasing its revolving credit facility from $170.3 million to $250.0 million. This results in a combined total of $1.325 billion in first lien term loans, with maturity dates extended to 2032. The maturity date for the revolving credit facility was also extended from 2028 to 2030.

data.title: La Marquise Jewellery from Dubai lands in Vogue's Cannes 2025 report, marking a milestone for the luxury brand.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on September 18, 2025, La Marquise Jewellery, a renowned luxury jewellery brand and the official Superbrand of 2024, reached a significant milestone by being prominently featured in Vogue's esteemed Cannes 2025 Red Carpet coverage. This accomplishment underscores the success of the brand and its increasing prominence on the global stage.

data.title: Redwire secures contract to deliver Stalker UAS to European NATO ally for reconnaissance. #RDW #defenseTech.
data.description: Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW), a prominent player in space and defense technology solutions, revealed today that its subsidiary Edge Autonomy secured a contract from an undisclosed European NATO nation. The agreement entails the delivery of the Edge Autonomy Stalker Group 2 fixed-wing unmanned aerial system (UAS) for extended reconnaissance and intelligence operations. The deal encompasses Stalker aircraft systems, spare parts, and training services. This strategic move highlights the company's strong foothold in the industry and its commitment to cutting-edge technology.

data.title: NFSG Corporation expands its Proprietary Wealth Management Program nationwide, providing advisors and clients with sophisticated portfolio management.
data.description: A company based in Boca Raton, Florida, NFSG Corporation, has announced the nationwide expansion of its Wealth Management Program. This program provides sophisticated portfolio management services to advisors and clients across the country. The expansion aims to increase access to the program on a larger scale.

data.title: National U.S. auto lending platform signs contract to purchase FUTR data, with access to 60 lenders and 3,000 dealers.
data.description: Toronto--The FUTR Corporation, listed on TSX.V as FTRC and on OTCQB as FTRCF, a consumer AI Agent App, has secured its initial brand contract regarding data. The agreement is with a National U.S. Auto Lending Platform, which has connections to more than 60 lenders and 3,000 independent auto dealers. The main points of the deal include the platform utilizing FUTR’s extensive data to create tailored refinancing proposals for FUTR customers who have given consent. The brand intends to capitalize on FUTR’s comprehensive data resources.
